description_long: This is a stylized anime-inspired doll with a slender, pale body and exaggerated proportions, featuring very long, vibrant lavender hair styled into two high pigtails that cascade down past the knees. The doll's face is large with prominent, expressive eyes, a small nose, and a subtle mouth, giving it a youthful and animated appearance. It is dressed in minimal, form-fitting white undergarments, including a bra and panties, with no visible patterns or embellishments. The arms are elongated and held slightly away from the body, while the legs are straight and close together, contributing to a static, upright pose. The surface of the doll appears smooth and slightly matte, typical of high-quality plastic or vinyl figures. No visible joints or articulation points are present, suggesting a fixed-pose collectible design.
description: A stylized anime doll with long lavender pigtails, expressive eyes, and minimal white undergarments, featuring a smooth, matte surface and a static upright pose.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full length of the lavender pigtails, the back of the head, and the back of the white undergarments.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the dramatic length of the pigtails extending behind the body.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's expressive face, large eyes, and the front of the white undergarments, with pigtails framing the body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the face and body, and the long pigtails trailing behind.
attribute_clothing_style: Minimalist undergarments consisting of a plain white bra and panties, with no visible patterns or decorative elements, typical of basic doll attire.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs together; head facing forward, body static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, open eyes, relaxed mouth, and slightly arched eyebrows, conveying a calm and passive demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Extremely long, straight lavender hair styled into two high pigtails that extend well past the waist, with slight inward curls at the ends.
